testsuite.name: com.ricoh.printservice.PrintServiceTest

testcase.name: PclEncoder should correctly encode a black pixel
RicohPrintService should send data to printer via socket
testcase.failure: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Unsupported address type at java.base/java.net.Socket.connect(Unknown Source) at com.ricoh.printservice.PrintServiceTest$RicohPrintService should testcase.name: PclEncoder should generate correct PCL header and footer
PclEncoder should correctly encode Arabic-like pattern

testsuite.system-err:
